deepDive.title: Feature deep dive
deepDive.subtitle: Explore AZON's core modules in detail

hr.title: HR Management
bullets: Complete employee profiles (personal info, ID, emergency contacts)
Track work stages (probation → official → offboarding)
Employee transitions (promotions, department changes, restructuring)
Rewards & discipline decisions with decision numbers
Salary proposal workflow — 3-level approval: HR → Director → Execution
Company-wide periodic salary increases
Register dependents for personal income tax deduction

contract.title: Labor Contracts
bullets: Template builder with dynamic variables (name, salary, department auto-filled)
5 contract types: Probation, Fixed-term, Indefinite, Seasonal, Project-based
Internal e-signing workflow (Draft → Sign → Approve → Active)
Addendums for amendments and additions
Audit log tracking every change
Export professional PDF contracts

timekeeping.title: Time & Shifts
bullets: Multi-method check-in/out: GPS, WiFi, IP, fingerprint, face, card, app
Flexible shift creation (morning, afternoon, night, custom)
Assign employees to shifts by week/month
Shift-change requests with approval workflow
Aggregate timesheets by department/branch
Holiday management — automatic workday calculation
Register & approve overtime

payroll.title: Payroll & Income
bullets: Automatic monthly payroll calculation
Configure social/health/unemployment insurance per Vietnam regulations
Progressive personal income tax, family & dependent deductions
Flexible allowances: fixed / daily / hourly / percentage
Payroll approval flow: Draft → Calculate → Approve → Pay → Close period
Full salary-increase history across employees
Export detailed payslip PDFs

essHighlight.title: Employee Self-Service — cut 80% of admin work
essHighlight.subtitle: Employees look up and act on their own — HR focuses on strategy

appFeatures.title: A dedicated app for employees
appFeatures.subtitle: Every HR action on your phone — time tracking, leave requests, payslips, contracts — without going through HR

smartCheckIn.title: Smart Check-in
smartCheckIn.subtitle: Smart Check-in
bullets: Clock in/out with a single tap right from the home screen.
Track real working hours in real time.
Check-in reminders so you never miss a workday.

scheduleLeave.title: Schedule & Leave Management
bullets: View detailed shift schedules by week/month so you can plan your personal time.
Request leave online: submit and track approval status instantly.
Check remaining leave days transparently.

overtime.title: Overtime & Performance Tracking
bullets: Register overtime easily and have it accurately recorded on your timesheet.
View detailed attendance history to reconcile whenever needed.

payroll.title: Payslips & Analytics
bullets: Receive a detailed digital payslip every month: base salary, allowances, deductions, and net pay.
Workday and hour charts give you an overview of your income and effort.

documents.title: Personal Records & Contracts
bullets: Store and look up personal info, email, and contact records.
Manage digital labor contracts: view your contract list, signing status, and addendums as convenient PDFs.

notifications.title: Instant Notifications
bullets: Get instant notifications about important company news, holiday schedules, or approval decisions right on your lock screen.

midCta.description: Unify time tracking, leave, payroll, contracts, and reporting — all in a single platform that runs lean!

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant
bullets: Each business has its own separate workspace
Data fully isolated between tenants
Absolute security — no cross-data leaks

permissions.title: Granular permissions
bullets: Create unlimited role groups
Permissions down to each action: View, Create, Edit, Delete, Approve, Execute
Every module has its own permission set

multilingual.title: Multi-language
bullets: Supports Vietnamese & English
Instant language switch — no page reload
Ready to add more languages

blog.pageSubtitle: Latest updates from AZON — policies, awards, partnerships and promotions

notice.title: AZON announcement — free e-invoice and digital signature
notice.excerpt: Dear customers, in the context of Decree 70/2025/NĐ-CP taking effect on June 1, 2026...
notice.content:
Dear customers,

In the context of Decree 70/2025/NĐ-CP taking effect on June 1, 2026, AZON is pleased to announce fully free e-invoice and digital signature services for all customers on our platform.

Eligibility

  • All businesses on AZON Standard plan or above
  • New sign-ups during the promotion period
  • Household businesses needing digital transformation per the Decree

Benefits

  • 100% fee waiver for e-invoice issuance in the first year
  • Free business digital signature service
  • Free implementation and onboarding support

For details, please contact AZON's consulting team via hotline or email listed in the Contact section.

Best regards,
The AZON team

award.title: AZON ranked TOP 10 products & services of 2025 — Technology category
award.excerpt: On December 20, at the Vietnam Trusted Products & Services 2025 program hosted by Vietnam Economic Magazine...
award.content:
On December 20, at the Vietnam Trusted Products & Services 2025 program hosted by Vietnam Economic Magazine in partnership with VnEconomy, AZON was proudly named among the TOP 10 trusted products and services in the technology category.

The award was voted by

  • More than 20,000 consumers and businesses nationwide
  • Expert council of Vietnam Economic Magazine
  • Evaluation criteria including product quality, reliability, and market impact

What this means for AZON

This milestone recognizes AZON's efforts in digitally transforming Vietnam's HR industry. In 2025, AZON has served 500+ businesses with over 200,000 employees using the platform daily.

We sincerely thank all our customers, partners, and team members for trusting and walking this journey with us.

partnerBank1.title: Vietinbank account holders now receive payment notifications on AZON
partnerBank1.excerpt: AZON officially integrates the payment notification service via Vietinbank accounts directly in the app.
partnerBank1.content:
AZON officially integrates the payment notification service via Vietinbank accounts directly in the app.

New features

  • Receive real-time balance change notifications in AZON
  • Automatic reconciliation with payroll and internal invoices
  • Bank-grade security — no password sharing required

Users only need to link their Vietinbank account once to start using this feature.

partnerBank2.title: Vietcombank balance change notifications integrated directly on AZON
partnerBank2.excerpt: After Vietinbank, AZON continues to expand its banking ecosystem with Vietcombank.
partnerBank2.content:
After the success with Vietinbank, AZON expands its integrated banking ecosystem with Vietcombank — one of Vietnam's largest commercial banks.

Benefits for businesses

  • Automatic reconciliation of company cash flows
  • Instant notifications on balance changes
  • Connected to the Payroll module for salary disbursement cross-check

promo.title: Save 5,370,000đ instantly with the 3-year AZON Professional combo
promo.excerpt: Our biggest promotion of the year for businesses committing to a long-term partnership with AZON.
promo.content:
Our biggest promotion of the year for businesses committing to a long-term partnership with AZON.

Offer details

  • Instant discount of 5,370,000đ when signing up for the 3-year Standard plan
  • Includes 12 months of premium technical support
  • Free implementation and onboarding for all employees

Promotion runs through December 31, 2025.

partnerMb.title: AZON partners with MBBank on a 1,000 billion VND loan package
partnerMb.excerpt: AZON and MBBank sign a strategic partnership offering preferential loans worth 1,000 billion VND to SMEs.
partnerMb.content:
AZON and MBBank have officially signed a strategic partnership, providing preferential loans of up to 1,000 billion VND for SMEs using the AZON platform.

Eligibility

  • Businesses using AZON for at least 3 months
  • Clear payroll history on the system
  • Streamlined loan process — disbursement within 48 hours

For details, please contact AZON's consulting team or your nearest MBBank branch.
